continue_1: ^CITL Personel: The Center for Innovative Teaching and Learning is located on the second floor of this building.
continue_2: ^CITL Personel: How can I assist you today?
continue_3: ^CITL Personel: This center helps the university implement a flexible learning system.
continue_4: ^CITL Personel: Its goal is to ensure the continuous delivery and improvement of education.
continue_5: ^CITL Personel: The center is composed of several sections.
continue_6: ^CITL Personel: These include faculty development and instructional support.
continue_8: ^CITL Personel: And instructional design and development.
continue_9: ^You: Improving the delivery of education? I wonder what new methods you have there?
continue_10: ^CITL Personel: You’ll find out while learning from your instructors, student.
continue_12: ^CITL Personel: Be seeing you around. Goodbye.
